final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [5:0] count
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 6'b0;
        end else begin
            count <= {~count[0], count[5:1]};
        end
    end

endmodule
